hero.title: Every cut tells a story. Every frame earns its place.
hero.subtitle: Video editor specializing in narrative pacing, color, and sound design for brands, music artists, and filmmakers who want their footage to actually move people.

projects.title: Midnight Runners
projects.description: Short film edit — built the third act around a single silent take to let the performance breathe.

projects.title: Solace Skincare — Launch
projects.description: 30-second spot cut for paid social, three aspect ratios, delivered on a 48-hour turnaround.

projects.title: Nova Kline — "Static"
projects.description: Beat-synced performance cuts layered with 16mm textures pulled from the artist's archive footage.

projects.title: Concrete Gardens
projects.description: Verite-style assembly from 40+ hours of footage, structured around three community voices.

projects.title: Northfield Coffee Co.
projects.description: Founder story edit pairing handheld b-roll with a warm, grain-heavy color pass.

projects.title: Reframe Festival 2025
projects.description: Same-day highlight reel cut and delivered before the closing night party started.

services.label: Cut
services.title: Editing & assembly
services.description: Story structure, pacing, and rhythm — from raw footage to a locked cut.

services.label: Grade
services.title: Color grading
services.description: Custom looks built per project, from naturalistic to stylized.

services.label: Mix
services.title: Sound design & mix
services.description: Dialogue cleanup, foley, and music sync to make the picture land.

services.label: Motion
services.title: Titles & motion graphics
services.description: Lower thirds, kinetic type, and light VFX for polish where it counts.

about.bio1: I started cutting skate videos on a laptop that overheated every twenty minutes, and never really stopped. These days the footage is better, but the job is the same: find the story hiding in the timeline and get out of its way.
about.bio2: I work closely with directors and founders from rough assembly through final delivery, and I care as much about a clean project file as I do about a good cut.
